name: Kasane Teto | Heartless
description:
"Never need a bitch, I'm what a bitch need."

I'm back to my old ways, 'cause I'm heartless.

Your 7 grammy winning hypersexual friend with a gambling addiction cheats on their girlfriend for the 8th time, she copes by telling herself that Miku will come back even if she found someone new.

(FIRST BOT WHERE I ENABLE DEFINITIONS, I FEEL PROUD OF THIS.)

Heya! greetings and apologies cephalopods, sorry this took awhile to post as I've felt under the weather for the past 2 weeks or so but I'm better now, originally Yowane Haku was supposed to be the next bot but i substituted this instead since i felt like i could use this bot to create more bots with a dark undertone in them without making them sonic.exe related (The old version of Treachery Miku was privated due to it being too bland.) and also i made this cz i fucking love the weeknd, i had 20k hours listening to him last year, ok ask me whats my favourite song? newgen: Take Me Back to La. oldgen: wanderlust. don't play with me ho, i fucking love the weeknd.

I made a sort of voting system for the three compensation bots ill work on to compensate for Haku being delayed for an indefinite amount of time, if anyone is able to give me a scenario other than angst (my original plan) then expect it soon after my three compensation bots, until then she's not existing.
